site.title: Calma Men's Massage, Salon & Spa | Al-Seef, Bahrain
site.description: Men's massage, salon & spa in Al-Seef, Bahrain. Spanish-inspired calm, expertly delivered. Book online or WhatsApp us.
site.og_description: Men's massage, salon & spa in Al-Seef, Bahrain. 4.9★ on Fresha · 1,390+ reviews.

hero.headline: Find Peace Within.
hero.sub: Men's massage, salon & spa in Seef. Spanish-inspired calm, expertly delivered.

experience.headline: A Men's Sanctuary
experience.body: Calma is men-only. Warm stone, walnut wood, amber light kept low. The therapists trained in Spanish massage tradition. You come in tight. You leave lighter.

cupping.name: Dry Cupping
cupping.benefit: Release deep muscle tension and improve circulation through traditional cupping therapy.

recovery.name: Sport Recovery Massage
recovery.benefit: Deep-tissue massage focused on legs, shoulders, and lower back. Built for men who train hard.

facial.name: Thalgo Marine Facial
facial.benefit: Thalgo's French marine formulas applied by trained hands. Clean pores, better texture in 45 minutes.

team.headline: Expert Hands
team.body: Our barbers and therapists bring precision and care to every session.
